records.m_Talk_ENG: I-isn't that the Elixir?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-isn't that the Elixir?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-isn't that the Elixir?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You seem to recognize it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You seem to recognize it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You seem to recognize it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've only heard rumors.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've only heard rumors.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've only heard rumors.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Elixir said to grant ordinary people power comparable to Counters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Elixir said to grant ordinary people power comparable to Counters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Elixir said to grant ordinary people power comparable to Counters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... it supposedly comes with severe side effects.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... it supposedly comes with severe side effects.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... it supposedly comes with severe side effects.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not to mention, the formula is strictly controlled by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not to mention, the formula is strictly controlled by the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not to mention, the formula is strictly controlled by the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know who you are, but the Elixir itself is illegal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know who you are, but the Elixir itself is illegal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know who you are, but the Elixir itself is illegal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. That's not something you need to worry about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. That's not something you need to worry about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. That's not something you need to worry about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all, I made these myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all, I made these myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all, I made these myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just because you made it doesn't make it legal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just because you made it doesn't make it legal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just because you made it doesn't make it legal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I must say, I sympathize with <color=#ffd34c>what you've been through</color>, Dr. Ludwig von Herrchen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I must say, I sympathize with <color=#ffd34c>what you've been through</color>, Dr. Ludwig von Herrchen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I must say, I sympathize with <color=#ffd34c>what you've been through</color>, Dr. Ludwig von Herrchen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've found your research on Corruption quite fascinating.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've found your research on Corruption quite fascinating.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've found your research on Corruption quite fascinating.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Consider this my way of returning the favor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Consider this my way of returning the favor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Consider this my way of returning the favor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you doing this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you doing this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you doing this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I already told you. I was impressed by your research, and this is my way of showing appreciation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I already told you. I was impressed by your research, and this is my way of showing appreciation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I already told you. I was impressed by your research, and this is my way of showing appreciation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your last paper, in particular, left quite an impression.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your last paper, in particular, left quite an impression.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your last paper, in particular, left quite an impression.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Genetic Alterations from the Aberrant Counterside Effect and the Potential of Latent Factors</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Genetic Alterations from the Aberrant Counterside Effect and the Potential of Latent Factors</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Genetic Alterations from the Aberrant Counterside Effect and the Potential of Latent Factors</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A failure that was released into the world incomplete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A failure that was released into the world incomplete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A failure that was released into the world incomplete.

I'll pretend you never showed me the Elixir, so
8g

I'll pretend you never showed me the Elixir, so
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:

records.m_Talk_ENG: As it happens, I have a keen interest in both Corruption and genetic engineering.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As it happens, I have a keen interest in both Corruption and genetic engineering.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As it happens, I have a keen interest in both Corruption and genetic engineering.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would you be willing to share more details about your research?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would you be willing to share more details about your research?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would you be willing to share more details about your research?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I decline.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I decline.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I decline.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've already retired from academia. I'm just waiting for my time to run out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've already retired from academia. I'm just waiting for my time to run out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've already retired from academia. I'm just waiting for my time to run out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a shame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a shame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a shame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You, of all people, could rise above failure and open new doors for humanity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You, of all people, could rise above failure and open new doors for humanity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You, of all people, could rise above failure and open new doors for humanity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Flattering, but I'm far too late for that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Flattering, but I'm far too late for that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Flattering, but I'm far too late for that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Elixir I sent you will slow down your Corruption.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Elixir I sent you will slow down your Corruption.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Elixir I sent you will slow down your Corruption.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make sure you receive it regularly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make sure you receive it regularly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make sure you receive it regularly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will sponsor you, Dr. Ludwig.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will sponsor you, Dr. Ludwig.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will sponsor you, Dr. Ludwig.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why go this far to use me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why go this far to use me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why go this far to use me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you want to see the end of the research you never got to complete?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you want to see the end of the research you never got to complete?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you want to see the end of the research you never got to complete?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wouldn't it be better to overcome the Corruption than to die a meaningless death?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wouldn't it be better to overcome the Corruption than to die a meaningless death?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wouldn't it be better to overcome the Corruption than to die a meaningless death?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wanted to live... and finish my research.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wanted to live... and finish my research.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wanted to live... and finish my research.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good. Now you're embracing your true desires.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good. Now you're embracing your true desires.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good. Now you're embracing your true desires.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a reward, I'll share mine as well.

records.m_Talk_FRA: As a reward, I'll share mine as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is <color=#ffd34c>a monster I wish to capture</color>.

records.m_Talk_FRA: There is <color=#ffd34c>a monster I wish to capture</color>.

records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I'm investing in you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A monster...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A monster...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A monster...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. A beast so terrifying, I can't even face it as I am now.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you out of your mind?!

records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a mutually beneficial arrangement.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not so different from what you've been doing.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Not so different from what you've been doing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't be ridiculous...!
